title: Cabbage and Beef Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, featuring slow-cooked beef and crunchy cabbage slaw. Perfect for a weeknight dinner or weekend fiesta.
instructions: Brown the ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Once the beef is browned, add the diced onion and cook until softened.
Add the shredded cabbage to the skillet and cook until it starts to wilt.
Season the beef mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the tacos by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef mixture onto a warmed taco, followed by a spoonful of salsa, a sprinkle of cheese, and a sprinkle of cilantro.
